title: Add Jira board validation rule for ARC repos
description: Across 5 sessions in arc-record-exchange and orch-service, the agent had to be reminded which Jira transition type applies (Simplified vs Defect/Sighting). Pre-loading this context as a user-level rule will eliminate the back-and-forth.
evidence: session-abc123 (2026-05-16T09:42Z): agent asked 'Which board is this ticket on?' — user clarified Simplified
session-def456 (2026-05-16T14:21Z): agent applied Defect transition to a Simplified board ticket; user corrected
session-ghi789 (2026-05-17T08:15Z): same correction needed within 2 minutes of session start

proposed_change.content:
**Rule 12 (added 2026-05-17): Jira Board Type Validation**

When working in ARC Team repositories (arc-record-exchange, orch-service), validate the Jira board type before applying transitions. Simplified boards use: Open → In Progress → Code Review → Done. Defect/Sighting boards use: New → Analysis → Fixed → Closed. Never apply Defect transitions to Simplified tickets. See `~/.claude/rules/jira-workflow.md` for the full transition matrix.

impact: Reduce mid-session corrections by ~80% across ARC repos. Currently averaging 1 correction per session.
